name: ScraperAPI Web Scraping API
what_it_does: Web scraping API that handles rotating proxies, CAPTCHA solving, browser rendering, and anti-bot detection automatically — agent passes a URL and receives the rendered HTML without managing infrastructure.
use_cases: Scraping JavaScript-heavy web pages without maintaining browser infrastructure
Extracting price, review, and product data at scale with automatic CAPTCHA solving
Bypassing geo-restrictions with country-specific proxy rotation
Monitoring competitor websites for price and content changes via agent workflows
Collecting structured data from websites that block standard HTTP requests
not_for: Real-time data at sub-second latency (scraping inherently has latency)
APIs that have official data access (use the API instead of scraping)
Scraping sites that prohibit it in ToS — check legality and permissions first
best_when: An agent needs to extract data from web pages without managing proxy infrastructure, CAPTCHA solving, or browser rendering.
avoid_when: The target website has an official API — use it instead. Or when real-time data is required.

auth.notes: API key passed as query parameter with each request. Single key per account. No scoping — key has full access to account credits. Simple GET request model: append API key and target URL.

pricing.paid_tiers: Hobby $49/month (100k calls); Startup $149/month (1M calls); Business custom
pricing.notes: Call-based pricing. JavaScript rendering costs 5-10x more credits than regular requests. Generous free tier for development. Affordable at small scale. Overages charged automatically.

performance.rate_limits: Concurrency limits per plan (5-500 concurrent requests)

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Simple API with excellent documentation. Error responses include status codes with explanations (blocked, timeout, bad URL). Retry guidance documented. SDK available for popular languages.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Each scrape request is stateless and idempotent — same URL may return different content if target changes. API itself is safe to retry.
known_agent_gotchas: High latency (5-30 seconds per request) — agents must use async patterns and long timeouts
JavaScript rendering costs 5-10x credits — use only when needed
Some sites still block despite proxy rotation — not a 100% success guarantee
API key in query parameter can appear in server logs — handle with care

security_score_components.security_notes: API key in query parameter is less secure than headers — may appear in server logs. TLS enforced. No scope granularity — key has full account access. Legal and ethical considerations for scraping must be handled by user.
